(DANDADAN AU)

In a world that seemed normal, aliens, yokais, spirits and much more roamed the the land. Momo Ayase and Okarun, discover the world of the paranormal of odd.

Thinking they were the only two, Momo and Okarun meet more people who were just like them. Including The legendary swordsman. Roronoa Zoro himself and The one and only pirate hunter 🫵🫵
